subtitle: Tibetan Diagnosis
description: Traditional Tibetan pulse diagnosis assesses your constitution and identifies imbalances. Combined with precision-formulated herbal remedies prepared according to ancient texts.

subtitle: Warm Herbal Oil Massage
description: Warm medicated herbal oil massage that balances your body constitution, improves circulation, deeply nourishes tissues, and calms the nervous system.

subtitle: Traditional Suction Therapy
description: Ancient suction cup therapy that draws out toxins, improves energy flow, and relieves musculoskeletal pain. Combines Tibetan and traditional techniques.

subtitle: Tibetan Needle Therapy
description: Precision needle placement at vital energy points to restore balance, relieve pain, and stimulate the body's innate healing capacity.

subtitle: Healing Heat Therapy
description: Therapeutic burning of dried artemisia herb near specific points to warm meridians, expel cold, and invigorate the flow of vital energy through the body.

subtitle: Oil Flow Therapy
description: A continuous warm stream of medicated oil poured gently over the forehead (third eye), inducing deep relaxation, calming the mind, and balancing the nervous system.

subtitle: Lower Back Oil Treatment
description: Warm medicated oil retained in a dough well placed over the lower back to deeply penetrate and nourish the lumbar spine, relieving chronic back pain and stiffness.

subtitle: Neck Oil Treatment
description: Targeted warm oil pool therapy on the neck and cervical spine to relieve stiffness, tension headaches, and cervical spondylosis.
